debug_info.goal:
ι : Type
oSpec : OracleSpec ι
StmtIn WitIn StmtOut WitOut : Type
n : ℕ
pSpec : ProtocolSpec n
inst✝ : (i : pSpec.ChallengeIdx) → SampleableType (pSpec.Challenge i)
σ : Type
init : ProbComp σ
impl : QueryImpl oSpec (StateT σ ProbComp)
relIn : Set (StmtIn × WitIn)
relOut : Set (StmtOut × WitOut)
verifier : Verifier oSpec StmtIn StmtOut pSpec
rbrKnowledgeError : pSpec.ChallengeIdx → NNReal
hInit : HasEvalSPMF.NeverFail init
stF :
  Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunctionOneShot ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut n pSpec σ init impl relIn.language relOut.language
    verifier
oneShotE : @Extractor.RoundByRoundOneShot ι oSpec StmtIn WitIn n pSpec
stmtIn : StmtIn
witIn : WitIn
prover : Prover oSpec StmtIn WitIn StmtOut WitOut pSpec
i : pSpec.ChallengeIdx
this :
  Pr[fun x =>
      @Verifier.rbrKnowledgeSoundnessOneShot.match_2 ι oSpec n pSpec i (fun x => Prop) x
        fun transcript challenge proveQueryLog =>
        (stmtIn, @oneShotE (↑i).castSucc stmtIn transcript proveQueryLog.fst) ∉ relIn ∧
          ¬Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunctionOneShot.toFun ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut n pSpec σ init impl relIn.language
                relOut.language verifier stF (↑i).castSucc stmtIn transcript ∧
            Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunctionOneShot.toFun ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut n pSpec σ init impl relIn.language
              relOut.language verifier stF (↑i).succ stmtIn (Transcript.concat challenge transcript) |
      do
      let __do_lift ← init
      ((fun {α} x => (simulateQ (Verifier.rbrSoundness_queryImpl ι oSpec n pSpec σ)).toFun α x) do
              let __discr ← Prover.runWithLogToRound (↑i).castSucc stmtIn witIn prover
              @Verifier.rbrKnowledgeSoundnessOneShot.match_1 ι oSpec StmtIn WitIn StmtOut WitOut n pSpec prover i
                  (fun __discr =>
                    OracleComp (oSpec + pSpec.challengeOracleInterface.spec)
                      (Transcript (↑i).castSucc pSpec ×
                        pSpec.Challenge i × (oSpec + pSpec.challengeOracleInterface.spec).QueryLog))
                  __discr fun transcript snd proveQueryLog => do
                  let challenge ← liftM (pSpec.getChallenge i)
                  pure (transcript, challenge, proveQueryLog)).run'
          __do_lift] ≤
    ↑(rbrKnowledgeError i)
⊢ Pr[fun x =>
      ∃ witMid,
        ¬Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunction.toFun ι oSpec StmtIn WitIn StmtOut WitOut n pSpec σ init impl relIn relOut
              verifier (fun x => WitIn)
              (Extractor.RoundByRoundOneShot.toRoundByRound ι oSpec StmtIn WitIn WitOut n pSpec oneShotE)
              (Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunctionOneShot.toKnowledgeStateFunction ι oSpec StmtIn WitIn StmtOut WitOut n
                pSpec σ init impl relIn relOut verifier stF oneShotE)
              (↑i).castSucc stmtIn x.1
              (@Extractor.RoundByRound.extractMid ι oSpec StmtIn WitIn WitOut n pSpec (fun x => WitIn)
                (Extractor.RoundByRoundOneShot.toRoundByRound ι oSpec StmtIn WitIn WitOut n pSpec oneShotE) (↑i) stmtIn
                (Transcript.concat x.2.1 x.1) witMid) ∧
          Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunction.toFun ι oSpec StmtIn WitIn StmtOut WitOut n pSpec σ init impl relIn relOut
            verifier (fun x => WitIn)
            (Extractor.RoundByRoundOneShot.toRoundByRound ι oSpec StmtIn WitIn WitOut n pSpec oneShotE)
            (Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunctionOneShot.toKnowledgeStateFunction ι oSpec StmtIn WitIn StmtOut WitOut n pSpec
              σ init impl relIn relOut verifier stF oneShotE)
            (↑i).succ stmtIn (Transcript.concat x.2.1 x.1) witMid |
      do
      let __do_lift ← init
      let a ←
        ((simulateQ (Verifier.rbrSoundness_queryImpl ι oSpec n pSpec σ)).toFun
                ((Transcript (↑i).castSucc pSpec × prover.PrvState (↑i).castSucc) ×
                  (oSpec + fun i => pSpec.Type ↑i).QueryLog)
                (Prover.runWithLogToRound (↑i).castSucc stmtIn witIn prover)).run
            __do_lift
      (fun a_1 => (a.1.1.1, a_1.1, a.1.2)) <$>
          ((simulateQ (Verifier.rbrSoundness_queryImpl ι oSpec n pSpec σ)).toFun (pSpec.Type ↑i)
                (liftM (pSpec.getChallenge i))).run
            a.2] ≤
    Pr[fun x =>
      (stmtIn, @oneShotE (↑i).castSucc stmtIn x.1 x.2.2.fst) ∉ relIn ∧
        ¬Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunctionOneShot.toFun ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut n pSpec σ init impl relIn.language
              relOut.language verifier stF (↑i).castSucc stmtIn x.1 ∧
          Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunctionOneShot.toFun ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut n pSpec σ init impl relIn.language
            relOut.language verifier stF (↑i).succ stmtIn (Transcript.concat x.2.1 x.1) |
      do
      let __do_lift ← init
      let a ←
        ((simulateQ (Verifier.rbrSoundness_queryImpl ι oSpec n pSpec σ)).toFun
                ((Transcript (↑i).castSucc pSpec × prover.PrvState (↑i).castSucc) ×
                  (oSpec + fun i => pSpec.Type ↑i).QueryLog)
                (Prover.runWithLogToRound (↑i).castSucc stmtIn witIn prover)).run
            __do_lift
      (fun a_1 => (a.1.1.1, a_1.1, a.1.2)) <$>
          ((simulateQ (Verifier.rbrSoundness_queryImpl ι oSpec n pSpec σ)).toFun (pSpec.Type ↑i)
                (liftM (pSpec.getChallenge i))).run
            a.2]

  intro x hx
  simp [Extractor.RoundByRoundOneShot.toRoundByRound, Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunctionOneShot.toKnowledgeStateFunction] at *
  split_ifs at * <;> simp_all [stF.toFun_empty]

  simp [KnowledgeStateFunction.toKnowledgeStateFunction, RoundByRoundOneShot.toRoundByRound, extractMid] at *
  split_ifs at h_not_kSF h_kSF <;> simp_all

Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunctionOneShot.toKnowledgeStateFunction,
    Extractor.RoundByRoundOneShot.toRoundByRound, not_exists, not_or, not_and, not_not, id_eq, cast_eq]
  refine probEvent_mono ?_
  intro ⟨transcript, challenge, proveQueryLog⟩ hx
  obtain ⟨witMid, h1, h2⟩ := hx
  have hi : (↑i : Fin (n + 1)) ≠ 0 := by
    rw [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_castSucc]; exact i.1.prop.ne_zero
  simp [hi] at h1
  simp [h1]
  cases h2 with
  | inl h2' => exact h2'
  | inr h2' =>
    have := stF.toFun_full stmtIn (transcript.concat challenge)
    sorry

    refine ⟨h_pre.2, h_pre.1, h_post.elim id (fun h_E => ?_)⟩

    contrapose! h_E
    sorry

    simp [Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunction.toStateFunction, Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunctionOneShot.toKnowledgeStateFunction, Extractor.RoundByRoundOneShot.toRoundByRound] at h_neg h_pos
